children.heading: Reclamation projects
children.label: a Reclamation projects
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter supersedes or amends any Federal law associated with a project, or a portion of a project, constructed under the reclamation laws.

children.heading: No new or supplemental benefits
children.label: b No new or supplemental benefits

children.text: be considered to be a new or supplemental benefit for purposes of the Reclamation Reform Act of 1982 ( et seq.); or43 U.S.C. 390aa
